title: The Cave City
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Cave City''' on [[Rennokk]] was little more than a rumor. The explorer [[Reidi Artom]] reported trying to reach a cave on Rennokk, but was chased off by a worm-like lava creature c. [[232 BBY/Legends|232 BBY]]. Another group of explorers returned about a century later and found a city of interconnected metal buildings, but they were also chased by the lava worm. Only one of the explorers, a [[Tarasin]] named [[Kum'Jushkin]], survived. His accounts have been called into question, as he was often drunk when he told the story, and his embellishments kept growing over time.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-03-XX -->''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]''
